en_title: Opinion: With A $949 Steam Deck, The Steam Machine Will Probably Be Very Expensive
cn_title: 观点：Steam Deck涨到$949，Steam主机恐怕更贵

paragraphs.en: In the six months since Valve announced the Steam Machine, PC gaming hardware has continued to get more expensive, and now that the Steam Deck has an official price increase, anyone hoping to get a Steam Machine for less than a thousand bucks is probably going to be disappointed.
paragraphs.cn: 自Valve宣布Steam Machine以来的六个月里，PC游戏硬件价格持续攀升。如今Steam Deck官方涨价已成事实，任何希望以不到1000美元拿下Steam Machine的玩家，恐怕都要失望了。

paragraphs.en: When I visited Valve to take an early look at the Steam Machine last year, I was told that the price would be competitive with a comparable gaming PC. My gut feeling at the time was that would mean a $1,200 sticker price, which I walked back on once I started doing the math, figuring it would settle at around $800. But I wasn't taking a months-long RAM crisis into consideration.
paragraphs.cn: 去年我前往Valve提前体验Steam Machine时，对方告诉我其定价将与同等配置的游戏PC具备竞争力。当时我的直觉是这意味着1200美元的售价，但在开始计算后我又下调了预期，认为最终会落在800美元左右。然而我没有把持续数月的内存危机考虑在内。

paragraphs.en: Welcome to The Desert of the RAM

In the months since this all started, there have been these momentary glimpses of lower prices. I've been using this basic kit of G.Skill Flare X5 RAM as a sort of barometer for the memory market, and right now it's 'on sale' for $404. That's a high price to be sure, but it is about 10% lower than it's been for months. But, like all the other dips that have happened recently, that price will probably bounce back up in a few days.
paragraphs.cn: 自此事开始以来的这几个月里，价格偶尔会出现短暂回落。我一直用一套基础款G.Skill Flare X5内存作为内存市场的晴雨表，目前它「促销」价为404美元。这价格无疑很高，但比前几个月便宜了大约10%。然而和最近其他几次回落一样，这个价格估计过几天就会反弹。

paragraphs.en: It is technically cheaper, for now
paragraphs.cn: 严格来说现在确实便宜了一些

paragraphs.en: Even back in January, I was told by analyst Anshel Sag that this RAM crisis would be a long-term affair, and that just continues to be the case. But at least for the first few months, DIY PC builders were facing most of the pain. For a while at least, prebuilt gaming PCs and laptops were eating the price while the manufacturers had inventory to spare. But it seems like those days are drawing to an end.
paragraphs.cn: 早在今年1月，分析师Anshel Sag就告诉我这场内存危机将是一场持久战，事实也确实如此。但至少在最初几个月，承受痛苦的主要是DIY装机用户。在厂商库存还算充足的那段时间，预装游戏PC和笔记本的厂商一直在自行消化涨价压力。但看来这种日子即将结束。

paragraphs.en: Sony, Microsoft and Nintendo have all raised prices on their consoles, and now the Steam Deck has finally followed suit. In the short term, if you're in the market for a handheld gaming PC, you're probably best off trying to find something more affordable. For instance, the lower-tier Xbox Ally is still available at Best Buy for $599. You can even install SteamOS if you want a Steam-Deck like experience.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼、微软和任天堂均已上调主机价格，如今Steam Deck也终于加入涨价行列。短期来看，如果你想入手一台掌上游戏PC，最好选择更实惠的型号。例如低配版Xbox Ally在百思买仍可以599美元买到。如果你想体验类似Steam Deck的感觉，甚至可以自行安装SteamOS。

paragraphs.en: The Asus ROG Xbox Ally comes with an AMD Ryzen Z2 A and the Xbox Full Screen Experience. You even get a trial of Xbox Games Pass.
paragraphs.cn: 华硕ROG Xbox Ally搭载AMD Ryzen Z2 A处理器与Xbox全屏体验，甚至附赠Xbox Game Pass试用资格。

paragraphs.en: But I have to imagine it's only a matter of time before the Xbox Ally goes up in price, too. After all, it also has RAM in there. It pains me to say it, but we're probably heading into an era where most gaming devices start at around $1,000. It wouldn't surprise me in the slightest if the PS5 and Xbox Series X get another price bump up to that point, either.
paragraphs.cn: 但我不得不预想，Xbox Ally涨价也只是时间问题——毕竟它里面同样有内存。我不愿这么说，但我们恐怕正在迈入一个大多数游戏设备起价1000美元左右的时代。如果PS5和Xbox Series X再次涨价到这个水平，我也丝毫不会感到意外。

paragraphs.en: Steam Machine In the Age of AI

In the few posts Valve has made about the delayed Steam Deck, it has referenced the rising costs of hardware as the one thing holding its console back. At face value, it seems like the company is just holding the mini gaming PC back, hoping that prices will drop enough to launch the Steam Machine at a reasonable price. There will come a time, and probably soon, where everything is more expensive, and suddenly a $1,200 Steam Machine feels much more reasonable, especially if the consoles get another price bump.
paragraphs.cn: 在Valve为数不多的几篇关于Steam Machine延期的帖子中，公司将硬件成本上涨视为推迟主机发售的唯一原因。表面上看，Valve只是在搁置这台迷你游戏PC，期待价格回落到能让Steam Machine以合理售价上市的水平。但很快就会到来这样一个时刻：当一切都变贵之后，一台1200美元的Steam Machine突然会显得相当合理——尤其是如果主流主机再次涨价。

paragraphs.en: Because, sure, a $1,200 gaming PC with the equivalent of an AMD Radeon RX 7600 or Nvidia RTX 4060 is a hard sell when the PS5 costs $599. But that math is going to look a lot different if Sony's console goes up to $699 or $799 for the digital version.
paragraphs.cn: 毕竟当PS5只卖599美元时，一台搭载相当于AMD Radeon RX 7600或Nvidia RTX 4060显卡、售价1200美元的游戏PC确实难以打动消费者。但如果索尼的主机涨到699美元、数字版甚至799美元，这笔账就完全不一样了。

paragraphs.en: We still don't know when the Steam Machine is actually going to come out, but with each passing day, it becomes less likely that it's going to squeeze in under $1,000. I'd love to be wrong, but when Valve finally turns that order button on, don't be surprised if it's accompanied by a four-digit number.
paragraphs.cn: 我们仍不清楚Steam Machine究竟何时上市，但随着时间推移，它定价控制在1000美元以内的可能性越来越低。我希望自己是错的，但当Valve最终开启预购按钮的那一刻，请不要因看到一个四位数的标价而感到意外。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas是IGN的硬件与购买指南编辑，也是PC配件领域的女王。你可以在@Jackiecobra关注她。
